decision.summary: No open position needs management and no new BTC trade should be opened this cycle.
decision.rationale: There are no live positions to close or reduce. The latest available Beecthor context is still the 2026-04-08 video, which favored a corrective push higher before renewed downside, while Binance at 71028.0 shows that upside has stalled and price is now softer intraday. Even though the nearest bearish daily line on April 9 is the 70k dip market at 47.0%, the playbook rule says no new Beecthor video means no bet, so there is no valid playbook-compliant edge for a new entry.
